raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "President Biden plans to cut U.S. greenhouse gas emissions by 50%-52% by the year 2030.",
    "California aims to reduce its greenhouse gas levels to at least 80% below their 1990 level by 2030.",
    "California's climate goals include restoring climate to pre-industrial levels before 2050.",
    "SB 582 requires the California state board to ensure statewide greenhouse gas emissions are reduced to at least 80% below the 1990 level by 2030.",
    "SB 582 mandates the achievement and maintenance of net-negative greenhouse gas emissions in California by 2035.",
    "SB 582 calls for exercising global leadership in restoring atmospheric and oceanic concentrations of greenhouse gases to pre-industrial levels by 2050 at the latest.",
    "SB 582 commits to necessary carbon-removal targets to achieve the greenhouse gas reduction goals."
  ]
}
```
